requirements.title: record operator acceptance drill decision
requirements.acceptance_boundary: covered only when drill links approval, reproduction, rollback, outcome, learning, Mission Control, decision rationale, risk, blockers, safety, and not-proven refs

requirements.title: make release-state audit require operator acceptance from v9.0 onward
requirements.acceptance_boundary: covered only when release-state-audit includes operator-acceptance-drill-audit for v9.0+ releases

forecast.forecast_boundary: forecast is release governance evidence, not delivery certainty or external execution proof

not_proven: Requirement coverage proves trace coverage only; it does not prove production safety, semantic truth, market truth, or third-party adoption.
